name: Monthly Open Source Report
sources: Notable open source project launches, major version releases, and community milestones
contentBrief: Comprehensive overview of the open source ecosystem over the past month. Cover new projects gaining traction, significant releases, and emerging trends in developer tooling.
formatBrief: Formal research report style. Executive summary up top, then 4-5 thematic sections with subheadings. Include a 'What to Watch' section at the end. Target 1200-1500 words.
